sglang.title: [1/N] MoE Refactor: refactor `select_experts`
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This pull request extracts the select_experts computation from within FusedMoE and EPMoE, moving it outside these modules. This refactoring offers three key benefits:

Enable gate-router fusion.
Simplifying MoE's input: reducing input number from 16 to 7.
Unifying API with DeepEPMoE.

Th

sglang.title: Fix suffix mismatch for the metrics.
sglang.author: CharlesRiggins
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The suffix matcher for the suffix "duration" does not match the metric names "sgl_router_request_duration_seconds" or "sgl_router_pd_request_duration_seconds". As a result, the matcher doesn't set the bucket for those metrics as expected. Without the bucket info, the histogram metrics fal

sglang.title: bugfix: fix sglang crash in NVIDIA MIG container
sglang.author: Garrybest
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Fix #6110,#2933.
In a NVIDIA Multi-Instance GPU(MIG) container, process has no permission to call nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.total in order to get GPU memory capacity, leading to a crash.
nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.total --format=csv,noheader,nounits
[Insufficient Permissions]
Modi

sglang.title: [Feature] Simple Improve Health Check Mechanism for Production-Grade Stability
sglang.author: whybeyoung
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Background​
The current health interface in sglang is a "fake" endpoint that simply returns a 200 status code. This poses significant stability issues in production environments, especially when integrated with cloud-native systems like Kubernetes. The lack of meaningful health status makes it impos

sglang.title: Add bf16 output option for dsv3_router_gemm kernel
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
As described in #7679, the original dsv3_router_gemm kernel can only output fp32 tensor, which requires an extra conversion back to bf16.
This PR adds an bf16 output option for the router gemm kernel, so the extra conversion can be removed.

Modifications

Accuracy Test
python3 tests/test

sglang.bodyExcerpt:

Enable support for encoder-only models: Currently, the FlashInfer backend needs adjustments to correctly handle non-causal attention required by encoder architectures.
